title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
summary: The video argues that AI bots now constitute the majority of web traffic, with AI systems answering queries before users click links, and AI agents autonomously browsing and purchasing online. It positions this shift as a fundamental change in internet usage patterns, where machines are increasingly intermediating human-web interaction.
writeup: The video argues that automated bots now make up the majority of web traffic, marking a shift in how the internet is used. It covers three patterns: AI systems answering queries before users click through to source links, AI agents browsing autonomously, and agents making purchases online. The throughline is that machines increasingly sit between people and the web, mediating interactions that humans once handled directly.
